zh.lifeSummary: Robert Valletort是Reginald II de Valletort的兒子，於大約1115年出生在英國英格蘭戴文塔維斯托可。他於1136年與Alice de Clist在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1161年在英國英格蘭戴文貝 費雷斯享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Valletort was born about 1115, in Tavistock, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of Reginald II de Valletort. He married Alice de Clist in 1136, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1161, in Bere Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1161, à Bere Ferrers, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Valletortは約1115年にイギリスイギリスデボンタヴィストックでReginald II de Valletortの息子として生まれた。1136年にイギリスイギリスでAlice de Clistと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1161年にイギリスイギリスデボンバー フエレルズで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Valletort(은)는 대략 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 타비스톡에서 Reginald II de Valletort의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1136년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice de Clist(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1161년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 버 페레르스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Valletort родился около 1115 г. в местности тавистокк, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Reginald II de Valletort. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Clist в 1136 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
